name: Diners Club Privilege Credit Card

rewards.displayRate: 20 Reward Points / Rs 200 spent on Swiggy and Zomato
40 Reward Points / Rs 200 spent on hotels via SmartBuy (10X)
20 Reward Points / Rs 200 spent on flights via SmartBuy (5X)
20 Reward Points / Rs 200 spent via SmartBuy (5X)

domestic: Complimentary lounge access (8 domestic and 4 international visits per year, unlocked as 2 domestic and 1 international visit per quarter) is spend-based starting 1 July 2026: Requires spending Rs 60,000 in the preceding calendar quarter.
international: Complimentary lounge access (8 domestic and 4 international visits per year, unlocked as 2 domestic and 1 international visit per quarter) is spend-based starting 1 July 2026: Requires spending Rs 60,000 in the preceding calendar quarter.

specialSpendRules.notes: Grocery spends earn rewards capped at 2,000 Reward Points per calendar month.
Utility spends earn rewards capped at 2,000 Reward Points per calendar month. Telecom spends are also capped at 2,000 Reward Points per calendar month.
Insurance spends earn rewards capped at 2,000 Reward Points per calendar month (effective 1 July 2025).

joiningBenefitsValued.label: Complimentary annual memberships of Swiggy One and Times Prime as welcome benefit on spends of Rs 75,000 in the first 90 days of card issuance

joiningBenefits: Complimentary annual memberships of Swiggy One and Times Prime as welcome benefit on spends of Rs 75,000 in the first 90 days of card issuance

milestones.label: Vouchers worth Rs 1,500 from brands like Marriott Experience, Barbeque Nation, Lakme Salon, O2 Spa, Decathlon, McDonald's, or Domino's on quarterly spends of Rs 1.5 lakh

milestoneBenefits: Vouchers worth Rs 1,500 from brands like Marriott Experience, Barbeque Nation, Lakme Salon, O2 Spa, Decathlon, McDonald's, or Domino's on quarterly spends of Rs 1.5 lakh
additionalBenefits: Buy 1 Get 1 free on weekend movie and non-movie tickets via BookMyShow, up to 2 free tickets every calendar month, capped at Rs 250 per ticket
Extra 10% off on Dineout bills at participating restaurants via Good Food Trail program
additionalDetails: Reward Points on grocery transactions are capped at 2,00,000 total cycle cap, but specifically capped at 2,000 Reward Points per calendar month for grocery spends

Reward Points on utility and telecom transactions are capped at 2,00,000 total cycle cap, but specifically capped at 2,000 Reward Points per calendar month for utility and telecom categories individually
Reward Points on insurance transactions are capped at 2,000 Reward Points per calendar month (effective 1 July 2025)
Redemption of reward points for flights and hotel bookings on SmartBuy is capped at 50,000 per calendar month

salaried: Net salary of Rs 35,000 or more per month

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-07
Joining/Renewal fee is Rs 1,000 + GST, waived on annual spends of Rs 3 Lakh.
Reward Points earnings are 4 points per Rs 200 spent on eligible categories (base earn rate of 2 points per Rs 100 spent).
5X Reward Points (20 points per Rs 200) on Swiggy and Zomato, with the additional 4X points capped at 2,500 Reward Points per calendar month.
10X Reward Points on SmartBuy transactions, capped at 4,000 Reward Points per calendar month (and 2,000 per day).
Reward Points on grocery transactions, utility transactions, and telecom transactions are capped at 2,000 per calendar month individually.
Reward Points on insurance transactions are capped at 2,000 per calendar month (effective 1 July 2025).
A 1.75% markup fee (effective 15 May 2026) is charged on all transactions carried out in Indian Currency at international locations or with merchants registered overseas (DCC / Overseas Markup).

Complimentary lounge access (8 domestic and 4 international visits per year, unlocked as 2 domestic and 1 international visit per quarter) is spend-based starting 1 July 2026: Requires spending Rs 60,000 in the preceding calendar quarter.
Fuel surcharge waiver is not applicable on this card (discontinued since August 2023).
Card reissuance fee is Rs 199 for lost, stolen or damaged cards (effective 15 May 2026).
Onboarding benefit: Complimentary annual memberships of Swiggy One and Times Prime memberships are awarded on spending Rs 75,000 within the first 90 days of card issuance.
